steps: Go to https://platform.mindee.com and create an account (or log in)
In the left-hand menu, click the gear icon 'Settings'
Enter a name for your key (e.g. 'dev', 'production')
Click 'Create' and immediately copy the displayed key — it will not be shown again

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Mindee API key for document parsing

notes: The API key is shown only once at creation — copy it immediately
Free tier includes limited pages per month for invoice and receipt parsing
One API key grants access to all models within the organization
API keys have unlimited lifetime and must be manually revoked when no longer needed
The key is sent in the Authorization header as 'Token <your_key>'

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve account information to verify credentials
